market: Europe, North America, selected global markets (market engine availability varies)

power: 3.0 TFSI (CKVB): 335 hp (250 kW); 3.0 TDI (DADA/CTKB): 236-249 hp (175-185 kW) depending on version
fuelSystem: Direct fuel injection (petrol and diesel variants)
timingDrive: Chain drive with variable camshaft timing
recommendedOil: Synthetic 5W-30 engine oil meeting VW 502 00 (petrol) or VW 507 00 (diesel) specifications

coolantCapacity: Approx. 10 liters (varies with market and engine options)

automaticTransmission: 7-speed S tronic dual-clutch automatic (petrol); 8-speed Tiptronic automatic (diesel in some markets)
transmissionFluid: Audi dual-clutch transmission fluid or automatic transmission fluid as specified per variant
differentialFluid: Synthetic gear oil specified for Audi quattro systems, change interval per maintenance schedule
brakeFluid: DOT 4 compliant brake fluid recommended, replace every 2 years
sparkPlugs: Iridium-tipped spark plugs in 3.0 TFSI V6, replacement interval approximately 60,000 km

Turbocharger wastegate valve wear in some 3.0 TFSI engines if oil changes neglected

Check for software updates related to emissions and stability control

differentialFluid: Audi-specified synthetic oil per intervals
